description: Triggers for staged rollouts, metrics hierarchy, bet retrospectives, and GTM execution

queries.query: Design a staged rollout plan for our new payment feature with 100K users
Build a metrics hierarchy — leading, core, lagging, and guardrail metrics
Run a bet retrospective and decide whether to scale, iterate, or kill
Set up dual-track discovery and delivery rhythm for our team
Design a GTM launch plan for our Tier 1 feature release
What rollback triggers should I define for this feature rollout?
Create success criteria — what metrics define scale vs iterate vs kill for this bet
Set up feature flags strategy for our staged rollout
Help me define what a Tier 2 launch means vs Tier 1 for our GTM process
Our metrics show mixed results post-launch — help me analyze and decide next steps
Convert this opportunity to a bet with hypothesis and metrics
Organize our product into capability blocks
Build the Opportunity Solution Tree for our retention outcome
Write a 1-page product strategy canvas
Coach my PM who struggles with executive communication
Help me run customer interviews this week
Design an eval strategy for our AI product feature
Build a portfolio management process across our product lines
Create a Now/Next/Later roadmap
Define our ICP and anti-ICP for product strategy
